subject: Paldean Tauros, a dark muscular bull-like creature in a charging action pose
description: A powerfully built dark bull-like creature lunges forward in a dynamic charging pose. The body is heavily muscular with short, compact horns visible on the head. The coloring is predominantly dark, nearly black, with some lighter tonal variation on the underbelly. The background is a warm-toned rocky or cavernous environment with oranges and browns suggesting a cliff face or cave interior. The creature's posture — low, driving forward — conveys raw physical aggression and close-quarters force. The composition emphasizes mass and momentum.
foreground: dark muscular bull-like creature in charging pose
background: rocky cave or cliff face environment
